tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[tab][ch]C7sus[/ch]
Hoo hoo wee hoo[/tab]
[tab][ch]C7sus[/ch]
Always together, together, forever[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C7[/ch]
Always together forever[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
I will love you 'til the day I die[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
I know this now, and my love won't run dry[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
You came along, my life has begun[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]
Two hearts are now beating as though they were one[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
 Like the stars that make the night so bright[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
You shine on me with a love that's so right[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Gm[/ch]
A love tha is lastin', a love that's so pure[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Each time I feel it, it makes me more sure[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]Dm[/ch]
I know with all my heart, we'll never part[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Gm7[/ch]
For this is the day whein our love comes alive[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C7[/ch]
And I mean what I say as I stand here sayin'[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]
 I pledge my love to you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]           [ch]C7[/ch]
  I pledge my love is true[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]
 I pledge my life to you[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Gm7[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]C7[/ch]
I do, my dear, I do, my dear[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Like a river finds the deep blue sea[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
Love took your hand and led you to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
This is the us that I'll never forget[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]
Both sparkling with love, both happy we met[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]Dm[/ch]
I know with all my heart, we'll never part[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Gm7[/ch]
For this is the day whein our love comes alive[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C7[/ch]
And I mean ev'ry word, and I want you to know that[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]
 I pledge my love to you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]           [ch]C7[/ch]
  I pledge my love is true[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]
 I pledge my life to you[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Gm7[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]C7[/ch]
I do, my dear, I do, my dear[/tab]


[Verse 4]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
I'm so proud to have you by my side[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
Ypou'll be my strength and I'll be your guide[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
You are the one, You're a dream that is real[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Heaven has sent you, It's love that I feel[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]Dm[/ch]
I know with all my heart, we'll never part[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Gm7[/ch]
For this is the day whein our love comes alive[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C7[/ch]
And I mean what I say if somebody should ask me[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]
 I pledge my love to you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]           [ch]C7[/ch]
  I pledge my love is true[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]
 I pledge my life to you[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Gm7[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]C7[/ch]
I do, my dear, I do, my dear[/tab]


[Coda]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
I do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]Gm[/ch]  [ch]Bbm[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
 I pledge my love to you[/tab]


Chords by Apollo Cave
